message:
fix(audit): resolve I25, I26, I30 from codebase audit

- I26: run_status now checks state.json modification time to detect stale
  daemon state instead of treating any parseable file as "running"
- I25: tune --apply now requires --yes in all output modes, not just Human,
  preventing silent config writes in JSON/non-TTY contexts
- I30: inject_json_hook uses depth-tracking parser instead of rfind('}')
  to correctly handle '}' inside JSON string values and JSONC comments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
